chunks.content:
A scanned black-and-white facsimile cover sheet from the law firm “Hagens Berman,” with typed form fields and some handwritten notes.

Top margin:
- “01/14/99 18:36 FAX 206 623 0594”
- Center: “HAGENS BERMAN”
- Handwritten at upper right: “WA Fee Pay. Agree. 0101/037”
- Handwritten below that: “Xc: jpw”
- Two solid black circular marks near the top (one left, one right).

Letterhead block:
- “HAGENS BERMAN”
- “Attorneys at Law”
- “1301 FIFTH AVENUE, SUITE 2900 • SEATTLE, WA 98101”
- “TELEPHONE (206) 623-7292 • FACSIMILE (206) 623-0594”

Title:
- “FACSIMILE COVER SHEET”

Form fields:
- “Date: January 14, 1999”
- “No. of Pages 37 (including this page)”
- “From: Steve W. Berman”
- “File No.: 1129.01”
- “Re: Tobacco - Fee Payment Agreement and Release”
- “COMMENTS:” (blank)

Recipient table headers:
- “Recipient(s):” | “Company:” | “Phone No.:” | “Fax No.:”

Recipients listed:
1. “Mr. Meyer G. Koplow” — “Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz” — “(212) 403-1000” — “(212) 403-2000”
2. “Mr. Arthur F. Golden” — “Davis, Polk & Wardwell” — “(212) 450-4000” — “(212) 450-4800”
3. “Mr. Martin Barrington” — “Philip Morris Inc.” — (phone blank) — “(917) 663-5399”
4. “Mr. F. Anthony Burke” — “Brown & Williamson Tobacco Corp.” — (phone blank) — “(502) 568-7297”
5. “Mr. Ronald Milstein” — “Lorillard Tobacco Co.” — (phone blank) — “(336) 335-7707”
6. “Mr. Charles A. Blixt” — “R.J. Reynolds Tobacco Co.” — (phone blank) — “(336) 741-2998”
7. “Mr. Stephen R. Patton” — “Kirkland & Ellis” — “(312) 861-2000” — “(312) 861-2200”

Lower section:
- “Urgent! Deliver Immediately.”
- “Please call the Support Center at (206) 268-9312 or __________ at ext. _____ if you do not receive all of these pages or if there is a problem.”

Confidentiality notice (boxed, small text):
- “The information contained in this facsimile is confidential and may also be attorney-privileged. The information is intended only for the use of the individual or entity to whom it is addressed. If you are not the intended recipient, or the employee or agent responsible for delivering it to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any use, dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this facsimile in error, please immediately notify us by a collect telephone call to (206) 623-7292, and return the original message to us at the address above via the US Postal Service. Thank you.”

Bottom center:
- “A PROFESSIONAL SERVICE CORPORATION”

Right edge (vertical number):
- “83573282”
